The complete mortgage calculator studio

Choose how you want to finance it, then run that scenario.

Purchase, affordability, FHA, refinance, rent vs. buy, VA purchase, VA refinance, DSCR, fix and flip, and HELOC tools are organized in one place without flattening them into the same generic calculator.

View all 10 calculatorsVA calculatorReview it with Dennis

Choose a calculator

Ten financing questions. Ten purpose-built tools.

Switch scenarios without leaving the studio. Your inputs remain available while that calculator stays open.

Purchase payment

Compare the complete monthly payment.

Change the financing path and see the fee, mortgage-insurance, and payment assumptions update together.

Base loan
$380,000

Modeled total loan
$380,000

Loan-program fees and mortgage insurance are modeled from common current assumptions. Use the dedicated FHA and VA calculators for their program-specific inputs.

Keep the scenario

Save the numbers or ask Dennis to review the assumptions.

Email this purchase setup to yourself, or ask Dennis for a one-time review without adding an automatic marketing-text opt-in.

Consent is not a condition of obtaining services.

Methodology & source notes

Every result is an educational illustration, not a quote, approval, commitment, tax opinion, or investment recommendation. Default rates are editable assumptions, not advertised pricing.

HUD FHA mortgage-insurance structureVA funding-fee chartUSDA guaranteed-loan overview
Program assumptions reviewed July 10, 2026. Verify all guidelines, fees, premiums, and eligibility for the actual file before relying on a result.

Your next move

A calculator answers one version of the question. A review compares the versions that fit your file.

Answer a few simple questions and get a clearer next step without a credit check.
